recommendation: Third-party instrument stress matching ATLAS remains largely persistent on live micro. Integrity is KV-backed (not mock), so the primary tension is multi-lane GI divergence and freshness, not KV seed outright failure. Deploy or alias POST /api/vault/attest for C-298 quorum registration. Configure Civic Protocol ledger API base for terminal so agent journal POST can mirror. Reconcile micro sweep root cycle metadata with CURRENT_CYCLE where operators rely on it.
